nasb.text: And she went out and said to her mother, “What shall I ask for?” And she said, “The head of John the Baptist.”

esv.text: And she went out and said to her mother, “For what should I ask?” And she said, “The head of John the Baptist.”

cnv.text: 於是她出去問母親：“我該求甚麼呢？”希羅底告訴她：“施洗的約翰的頭！”

ccb.text: 她便出去问她母亲：“我应该要什么呢？” 她母亲说：“要施洗者约翰的头！”

csbs.text: 于是女孩出去问她母亲说：“我应该要什么呢？” 她母亲说：“要施洗者约翰的头！”
